SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URETA, CESAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WINEMILLER, KEITH $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $634.50, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN NOVEMBER 16, 2012, GIVE POSSESSION OF THE DOG ROCCO, A CHIJUAJA-SNAUSER MIX, THE SUBJECT OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
